'''chajushu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:thalassiosiroid|thalassiosiroid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-j-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:thalassiosiroid|thalassiosiroid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| chajushu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæjishith|chæjishith]] || [[word:chæjishij|chæjishij]] || [[word:chæjishish|chæjishish]] || [[word:chæjishi|chæjishi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chajujushuth|chajujushuth]] || [[word:chajujushuj|chajujushuj]] || [[word:chajujushush|chajujushush]] || [[word:chajujushu|chajujushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chajushuth|chajushuth]] || [[word:chajushuj|chajushuj]] || [[word:chajushush|chajushush]] || [[word:chajushu|chajushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chajufshuth|chajufshuth]] || [[word:chajufshuj|chajufshuj]] || [[word:chajufshush|chajufshush]] || [[word:chajufshuf|chajufshuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chajushuthu|chajushuthu]] || [[word:chajushuju|chajushuju]] || [[word:chajushushu|chajushushu]] || [[word:chajushuku|chajushuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chajushuth|chajushuth]] || [[word:chajushuj|chajushuj]] || [[word:chajushush|chajushush]] || [[word:chajushu|chajushu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chajushuthul|chajushuthul]] || [[word:chajushujul|chajushujul]] || [[word:chajushushul|chajushushul]] || [[word:chajushukul|chajushukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chajushuthuthu|chajushuthuthu]] || [[word:chajushujuju|chajushujuju]] || [[word:chajushushushu|chajushushushu]] || [[word:chajushuku|chajushuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chajushuthun|chajushuthun]] || [[word:chajushujun|chajushujun]] || [[word:chajushushun|chajushushun]] || [[word:chajushukun|chajushukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chajushuthuoro|chajushuthuoro]] || [[word:chajushujuoro|chajushujuoro]] || [[word:chajushushuoro|chajushushuoro]] || [[word:chajushukuoro|chajushukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
